beats.what: The group is engaged in conversation; the man in the grey shirt is gesturing while talking, and the woman in the blue shirt is smiling.
The man in the grey shirt continues talking and laughing, while the man in the black shirt listens attentively.
The woman in the blue shirt laughs heartily, and the man in the black shirt smiles as they all interact around the table.
The man in the grey shirt leans forward slightly, still gesturing, as the group continues their lively discussion.
The man in the black shirt reacts to the conversation, and the woman continues to smile and enjoy the moment.
The group maintains their cheerful atmosphere, with the man in the grey shirt and the man in the black shirt actively engaging with each other.

formal.text: A man in grey gestures during a conversation.
The man in grey continues to speak and laugh.
A woman in blue laughs at the table.
The man in grey leans forward while gesturing.
The man in black reacts to the ongoing discussion.
The men in grey and black engage with each other.

sarcastic.text: He gestures with such profound importance.
Still captivated by this high-stakes drama.
Clearly, nobody wants this to end.

humorous_tech.text: Explaining why the legacy code actually works fine.
It's not a bug, it's a feature.
The team loves a good technical debt joke.
He doubles down on his architectural vision.
The senior dev is questioning everything.
They all agree to ignore it until Monday.

humorous_non_tech.text: He’s definitely telling that one story again.
And everyone is pretending it’s new.
The laughter is getting a little too loud.
He leans in to make it even more dramatic.
Somebody please tell him to breathe.
Still laughing, still dramatic, same old story.
